sampleHooks: ChatGPT can do your competitor research in a couple of minutes.

If your business depends on beating the competition—sales, real estate, mortgages, B2B—you need this. Running this one prompt saves me days of research. It instantly pulls a market overview, competitor analysis, opportunities, gaps, and even a clear action plan. Instead of scrolling reports or piecing together data, I get structured insights I can use right away. It even checks my inputs and confirms before diving in so I know it’s on track. I tested it as a mortgage broker in Boise, Idaho, targeting residential. It broke down competitors, online reviews, economic factors, weaknesses, differentiators, partnerships, digital strategies, offline tactics, and KPIs—all in one run. This is the type of analysis that would normally take me hours, even days, to build. Now it’s a 2-minute process. If you’re in sales and not using this, you’re leaving money and opportunities on the table.
Most business owners spend hours on competitor research. Here is how to do it in 45 seconds.

items.title:
ChatGPT can do your competitor research in a couple of minutes.
I used ChatGPT O3 to analyze top competitors.

In just a few minutes, AI mapped out:
✅ Strengths and weaknesses
✅ Pricing and standout features
✅ Feature gaps we can exploit
✅ CRO mistakes costing them leads

✅ A full action plan ranked by impact and ease   

  With ChatGPT and AI, you can build faster and find opportunities  

Comment 'Prompt' below and I'll share the detailed Prompt

#chatgpt #chatgpto3 #chatgpttips #competitorresearch #ai #aitips #aitools #greenscreenvideo

items.title:
Most business owners spend hours on competitor research. Here is how to do it in 45 seconds.

Paste any competitor website URL into ChatGPT with this exact prompt:

"You are a world-class business strategist. Analyse this website and tell me: who their target audience is, their main value proposition, what they are doing well, what gaps they have left open, and three things a competitor could do better."

What comes back is a strategic analysis that consultants charge thousands for. In under a minute. For free.

Save this prompt. Then drop your competitor's website URL in the comments below — I will tell you what I see when I run it.

#aitools #chatgpt #viral #solopreneur #fyp

items.title:
This AI reviews your code before your team even opens the pull request.

Kilo Code Reviewer automatically scans your PR for security issues, performance problems, and style inconsistencies, then leaves inline comments with suggestions.

Since it’s built directly into Kilo Code, it already understands your repo and context. If you want cleaner PRs and faster code reviews, this is worth trying.

Comment Kilo and I’ll send you the link.

#KiloCode #AIcoding #DevTools #CodeReview #Programming
